_HEADER: VALIDATED ENDPOINTS ONLY. Every entry in this file has been observed or successfully called. Client-code guesses live nowhere — they are dropped. For the authoritative spec-based catalog see api_documentation.json.

_validation_methods.network_trace_confirmed: Observed in live browser/Playwright devtools network capture; request fired, response status logged.
_validation_methods.live_call_success: Made a successful HTTP call from this machine with a live bearer/cookie and got a 2xx response with expected-shape body.
_validation_methods.prior_session_logged: Used successfully in a previous authorized session with output captured; not re-verified this session.

base_urls.shard_note: pm-api-137 and pm-wfe-137 are assigned per-office. For Exult (officeKey=161112) the locator returns shard 137. Verify with /api/locator/defaulturls before building against any other tenant.

flow: Launch-app calls window.open('https://pm-wfe-{shard}.advancedmd.com/practicemanager') — popup window establishes the session cookies at domain .advancedmd.com
auth.headless_blocker: If the Chromium launching this flow has popup-blocking enabled (default for headless and for Playwright Chrome-for-Testing without --disable-popup-blocking), the launch-app popup is blocked silently and the session cookies are NEVER written. A 'Compatibility check' modal is shown instead. Override window.open via Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument BEFORE navigating to the identity app, or relaunch with --disable-popup-blocking.
auth.twofa_delivery: Email only for this tenant. Sender noreply@advancedmd.com, recipient gautambharg@gmail.com. Codes arrive within ~30s and expire in ~10min. Each preauth issues a NEW code; the '5 attempts remaining' counter is per preauth token, not per account.
auth.angular_submit_gotcha: The Verify button on the 2FA form is only rendered once the input is ng-valid (pattern=^[0-9]{6}$). Before the form reaches valid state only a 'Resend code' button exists. To submit: fill the input, dispatch input+change+keyup events, wait 300ms, then call .click() on the enabled submit button. form.requestSubmit() does NOT work — the Angular NgForm handler is bound to button click, not native submit.
gotchas: 400 response body on /api/authentication/token/access is a raw C# stack trace string, not JSON. Check status before parsing.
The saml-session cookie on api-100.advancedmd.com is set pre-2FA and is NOT a usable bearer.

PPMDResults_{officeKey}_{user} localStorage object is the best 'am I logged in' signal — its `lst` field is the last-touch timestamp in office-local time and `usercontext` contains every service URL for the tenant.

endpoints.purpose: Validate that a given username belongs to a given office before triggering the full login flow.
Service discovery — returns the pm-api and pm-wfe host shard assigned to this office. Call this FIRST when bootstrapping a new tenant.

response.200: JSON mapping of service role to host URL (e.g. pmApi -> https://pm-api-137.advancedmd.com)

endpoints.purpose: Begin the MFA flow. Returns a pre-auth UUID (authorizationToken) that must be included in all subsequent auth calls. Determines which 2FA method will be used (EMAIL/SMS/TOTP).

200.authorizationToken: uuid (new, to use in subsequent calls)
200.daysLeft: int (days until 2FA required again after trust extension)

endpoints.purpose: Trigger delivery of the 6-digit 2FA code via email. For Exult this is the ONLY 2FA method enabled — SMS and TOTP are disabled at the account level.
Exchange the 6-digit email code + pre-auth token for the final session. On success sets PM session cookies (via subsequent launch-app popup chain) and may return an access_token in the response body.

response.400: Invalid code (body is a raw C# stack trace string, NOT JSON — do not attempt to parse as JSON before checking status)

endpoints.source_trace: Network trace of failed code attempts during 2026-04-05 early-AM session

endpoints.purpose: List/search patients scoped to an office. Used to pull the complete Exult patient roster (975 active records as of 2026-04-02).

firstappointmentstart.description: Filter to patients whose first appointment falls on/after this date. Verified: useful for 'new patients added in Q1' queries.

endpoints.response_shape_note: Envelope is INCONSISTENT across calls. Observed shapes: {totalcount, patients: [...]} and {count, data: [...]} and raw array. Defensive parsing required.
endpoints.rate_limit_observed: 5 req/s per hipaa-agent-work client config; not tested to failure

PPMDResults_{officeKey}_{user}.purpose: Session context cache written by the identity app after successful login. Contains every service URL for the tenant plus role flags.
key_fields: lst (last-touched timestamp in office-local time: MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS)
Results.success, Results.api (not a bearer — a role flag)

discovered_service_urls._source: Extracted from PPMDResults.usercontext in the Exult authenticated session 2026-04-05

not_yet_validated: Every FHIR endpoint (base path unknown — prior guesses of /fhir/v1/* are dropped; could be at fhir.advancedmd.com with tenant-scoped path or at pm-api with a different prefix)
Every connect/v1/* write endpoint (appointments, charges, balance) — these come from hipaa-agent-work client stubs and have not been confirmed
/api/appointments query — the status-code table (1=Scheduled...5=Rescheduled) came from amd_metrics.py author comments; needs live verification
Swagger/OpenAPI spec — pm-api-137 is a .NET API and MAY expose Swashbuckle at /swagger/v1/swagger.json; untested
Eligibility, claims, billing, documents, messages, tasks, audit log, providers, encounters endpoints — no observations yet

dropped_from_prior_catalog._reason: Entries with confidence:guess from commit 8df0e4eb (client-code grep / author comments) were dropped. Gautam already reverted that commit (a0dc863b) because guess-based entries poison the index. Re-add them only after live verification.
